title: Central Angle of a Regular Polygon

synopsis_cards.title: What is a central angle?
synopsis_cards.body: A full turn around a point is 360°. If a regular polygon is divided equally from the center, each part has the same angle.

synopsis_cards.title: Why it matters
synopsis_cards.body: Central angles help us understand regular polygons and solve geometry problems step by step.

common_mistakes: Confusing central angle with interior angle
Dividing by the wrong number of sides
